category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China to Uzbekistan) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan Lithium Battery and Power Bank Compliance Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源出口至乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國锂電池/行動電源出口至烏茲別克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Comparative reference for Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters evaluating Uzbek requirements against China baseline, with focus on O’zstandart scope, O’zDSt battery and safety requirements, importer-led market access, and UN 38.3 transport.
description.zh: 供中国锂电池/移动电源出口商比对乌兹别克斯坦与中国出口基准要求的参考资料，聚焦O’zstandart适用范围、O’zDSt电池与安全要求、进口商负责的准入流程及UN 38.3运输要求。
description.zht: 供中國鋰電池/行動電源出口商比對烏茲別克斯坦與中國出口基準要求的參考資料，聚焦O’zstandart適用範圍、O’zDSt電池與安全要求、進口商負責的准入流程及UN 38.3運輸要求。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulation references change; verify legal requirements with authorized Uzbek and Chinese legal or technical advisors before commercial action.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规可能变化，出口前请咨询具备资质的乌兹别克与中国法律、技术顾问进行核实。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規可能變化，出口前請諮詢具備資質的烏茲別克與中國法律、技術顧問進行核實。

answer_first.en: Uzbekistan applies a national regime led by O’zstandart and national importer obligations; GB 31241 and CCC are Chinese domestic references only and do not by themselves satisfy Uzbek market access steps.
answer_first.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦以O’zstandart为主导的国家制度并结合进口商义务进行监管；GB 31241和CCC仅是中国国内依据，不能单独满足乌兹别克斯坦市场准入要求。
answer_first.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦以O’zstandart為主導的國家制度並結合進口商義務進行監管；GB 31241和CCC僅是中國國內依據，不能單獨滿足烏茲別克斯坦市場准入要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update rows when source law, importer requirements, or national implementing documents change.
